name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, vote, decision

TypeOK == /\ state \in Participants \cup {"coordinator"}
          /\ vote \in [Participants -> {"yes", "no"}]
          /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "undecided"}

Init == /\ state = "coordinator"
        /\ vote = [p \in Participants |-> "undecided"]
        /\ decision = "undecided"

Prepare == /\ state = "coordinator"
           /\ state' = "preparing"

VoteYes == /\ state = "preparing"
           /\ vote' = [vote EXCEPT ![CHOOSE p \in Participants: vote[p] = "undecided"] = "yes"]

VoteNo == /\ state = "preparing"
          /\ vote' = [vote EXCEPT ![CHOOSE p \in Participants: vote[p] = "undecided"] = "no"]

Commit == /\ state = "preparing"
          /\ decision' = "commit"

Abort == /\ state = "preparing"
        /\ decision' = "abort"

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, vote, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
          (Hungry(i) /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i))
          \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutForks(i))
          \/ UNCHANGED <<forks, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
    /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = 0
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor = 1
              /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers <= N - 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers >= 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers = 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ writer_active = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, hasn

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"active", "recorded"}]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> {"empty", "full"}]]
          /\ marker \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]

(* Initial state: all processes active, all channels empty, no markers *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> "empty"]]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]

(* Process i sends a marker on channel i->j if it has recorded its state *)
SendMarker(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "recorded"
                    /\ channel[i][j] = "empty"
                    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "full"]
                    /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Process j receives a marker on channel i->j if it hasn't recorded its state yet *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ state[j] = "active"
                      /\ channel[i][j] = "full"
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j] = "recorded"]
                      /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "empty"]
                      /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i][j] = FALSE]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Process j receives a marker on channel i->j after recording its state *)
ReceiveMarkerAfter(i, j) == /\ state[j] = "recorded"
                           /\ channel[i][j] = "full"
                           /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "empty"]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* STRING process can send a regular message on any channel *)
SendMessage(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "active"
                     /\ channel[i][j] = "empty"
                     /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "full"]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* STRING process can receive a regular message on any channel *)
ReceiveMessage(i, j) == /\ state[j] = "active"
                       /\ channel[i][j] = "full"
                       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "empty"]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Next-state relation: any process can send or receive a marker or a regular message *)
Next == \E i, j \in 1..N :
          \/ SendMarker(i, j)
          \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j)
          \/ ReceiveMarkerAfter(i, j)
          \/ SendMessage(i, j)
          \/ ReceiveMessage(i, j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "active"}]

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

KeysVal == 1..Keys
ValuesVal == 1..Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [KeysVal -> ValuesVal]

Init == store = [k \in KeysVal |-> 1]

Put(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
Get(k) == /\ UNCHANGED store

Next == \E k \in KeysVal : \E v \in ValuesVal : Put(k, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES p, a, c, ballot

TypeOK == /\ p \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
          /\ a \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
          /\ c \in V

Init == /\ p = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE v \in V |-> TRUE]]
        /\ a = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE v \in V |-> TRUE]]
        /\ c \in V

Prepare(i) == /\ p[i].ballot' = p[i].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<a, c>>

Promise(i) == /\ a' = [a EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> p[i].ballot, value |-> a[j].value]]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<p, c>>

Accept(i) == /\ a' = [a EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> p[i].ballot, value |-> p[i].value]]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<p, c>>

Accepted(i) == /\ c' = p[i].value
              /\ UNCHANGED <<p, a>>

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..M: Prepare(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..M: Promise(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..M: Accept(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..M: Accepted(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<p, a, c>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES seq, ack, retransmits, state

TypeOK == /\ seq \in 0..N
          /\ ack \in 0..N
          /\ retransmits \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}

Init == /\ seq = 0
        /\ ack = 0
        /\ retransmits = 0
        /\ state = "idle"

SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
             /\ seq < N
             /\ state' = "sending"

Transmit == /\ state = "sending"
           /\ state' = "waiting_ack"

AckReceived == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
              /\ ack = seq
              /\ retransmits' = 0
              /\ state' = "idle"

AckLost == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
           /\ ack # seq
           /\ retransmits' = retransmits + 1
           /\ state' = IF retransmits' <= MAX_RETRIES THEN "sending" ELSE "failed"

Done == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ seq = N
        /\ state' = "done"

Next == \/ SendChunk
        \/ Transmit
        \/ AckReceived
        \/ AckLost
        \/ Done
        \/ UNCHANGED <<seq, ack, retransmits, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, ack, retransmits, state>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M
VARIABLES committed, snapshot, state, writes


TypeOK == 
    /\ txs \in 1..N
    /\ data \in 1..M
    /\ state \in [txs -> {"idle", "reading", "writing", "committed", "aborted"}]
    /\ snapshot \in [txs -> [data -> Nat]]
    /\ writes \in [txs -> [data -> Nat]]
    /\ committed \in [data -> Nat]

Init == 
    /\ state = [t \in txs |-> "idle"]
    /\ snapshot = [t \in txs |-> [d \in data |-> 0]]
    /\ writes = [t \in txs |-> [d \in data |-> 0]]
    /\ committed = [d \in data |-> 0]

    /\ state[t] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "reading"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, committed>>

Read(t, d, v) == 
    /\ state[t] = "reading"
    /\ snapshot[t][d] = v
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, writes, committed>>

Write(t, d, v) == 
    /\ state[t] = "reading"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "writing"]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][d] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, committed>>

Commit(t) == 
    /\ state[t] = "writing"
    /\ \A d \in data: writes[t][d] = 0 \/ committed[d] = snapshot[t][d]
    /\ committed' = [committed EXCEPT ![d] = writes[t][d] + committed[d] \A d \in data]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes>>

Abort(t) == 
    /\ state[t] = "writing"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, committed>>

Next == 
    \E t \in txs:
        \/ Begin(t)
        \/ \E d \in data : \E v \in Nat : Read(t, d, v)
        \/ \E d \in data : \E v \in Nat : Write(t, d, v)
        \/ Commit(t)
        \/ Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, snapshot, writes, committed>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
       /\ offsets' = offsets
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N :
       /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div 2,
                                      ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j]) \div 2]
       /\ clocks' = clocks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

TypeOK == flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN] /\ turn \in 0..1

Init == flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE] /\ turn = 0

Next ==
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
     /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
     /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes
VARIABLES infected, known

TypeOK == Nodes \subseteq 1..N /\ Nodes \in SUBSET 1..N

Init == /\ known = [n \in Nodes |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [n \in Nodes |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E n \in Nodes:
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![n] = known[n] \cup {m \in Nodes : infected[m]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![n] = TRUE]
        \/ \E n \in Nodes:
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N, Clients
VARIABLES allocated, free

Pages == 1..N

(* TypeOK ensures all variables stay within bounds *)
TypeOK == /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]

(* Initial state: all pages free, no client has pages *)
Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ \E c \in Clients:
       \E p \in free:
         /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
         /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients:
       \E p \in allocated[c]:
         /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
         /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

(* Invariant: no page allocated to more than one client *)
NoDoubleAllocation == \A p \in Pages: Cardinality({c \in Clients: p \in allocated[c]}) <= 1

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Messages

TopicSet == Topics
SubscriberSet == Subscribers
MessageSet == Messages

VARIABLES subscriptions, messages, delivered

subscriptions == [t \in TopicSet -> SUBSET SubscriberSet]
messages == [t \in TopicSet -> Seq(MessageSet)]
delivered == [t \in TopicSet -> [s \in SubscriberSet -> BOOLEAN]]

TypeOK == subscriptions \in [TopicSet -> SUBSET SubscriberSet] /\
          messages \in [TopicSet -> Seq(MessageSet)] /\
          delivered \in [TopicSet -> [SubscriberSet -> BOOLEAN]]

Init == /\ subscriptions = [t \in TopicSet |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in TopicSet |-> <<>>]
        /\ delivered = [t \in TopicSet |-> [s \in SubscriberSet |-> FALSE]]

Subscribe(sub, topic) == 
    /\ sub \in SubscriberSet
    /\ topic \in TopicSet
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \cup {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, delivered>>

Publish(msg, topic) ==
    /\ msg \in MessageSet
    /\ topic \in TopicSet
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(@, msg)]
    /\ delivered' = [t \in TopicSet |

                         [s \in SubscriberSet |-> delivered[t][s] \/ (s \in subscriptions[t])]

                         delivered[t]]
    /\ UNCHANGED subscriptions

Deliver ==
    /\ \E t \in TopicSet :
        /\ messages[t] # <<>>
        /\ \E sub \in subscriptions[t] : delivered[t][sub] = FALSE
    /\ delivered' = [delivered EXCEPT ![t][sub] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscriptions, messages>>

Next == 
    \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : Subscribe(sub, topic)
    \/ \E msg \in MessageSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : Publish(msg, topic)
    \/ Deliver

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, messages, delivered>> ==

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES turn, wants

TypeOK == turn \in 0..1 /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = TRUE]
    \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ wants[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Node
ASSUME N \in 1..10
ASSUME Node = 1..N

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == counts \in [Node -> [Node -> 0..N]]

Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next ==
  \E n \in Node :
    \E delta \in 1..N :
      /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + delta]]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Merge ==
  \E n, m \in Node :
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][m])]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next \/ Merge]_<<counts>>

====
